ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT
LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFFS MARC LANGLOIS AND CRAIG MATHIS' MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL IS DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS MARC LANGLOIS AND CRAIG MATHIS' MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT UNDER CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES AGREEMENT PROVIDES THAT THE "CURRENTLY EXISTING 52.5/47.5 PERCENT SPLIT WOULD BE THE BASIS UPON WHICH ESCROW WOULD CLOSE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189

MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER RE: DENYING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENFORCE/VACATE SETTLEMENT UNDER CCP 664.6

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS MARC LANGLOIS, AND CRAIG MATHIS' MOTION TO ENFORCE/VACATE SETTLEMENT UNDER CCP 664.6 IS DENIED. COURT HAS ALREADY DETERMINED THAT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS FORMED WHEN IT ENFORCED AND INTERPRETS THAT AGREEMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S EARLIER MOTION. SECTION 664.6 AS OPPOSED TO OTHER PROCEDURE THAT MAY BE AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLOW THE COURT TO RESCIND AN AGREEMENT OR DETERMINE A REMEDY FOR ITS BREACH. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Moitn To Enforce/Vacate Settlement Under Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MICHAEL W. FLYNN OF THE LAW FIRM OF GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN & HARRIS, TEL. NO. 673-5600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. CINDY LEE OF THE LAW FIRM OF FENG & LEE, TEL. NO. 885-5800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS HINGER AND BEATTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS MARC LANGLOIS AND CRAIG MATHIS' MOTION To Enforce/Vacate Settlement Under C C P 664.6 IS DENIED. COURT HAS ALREADY DETERMINED THAT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WAS FORMED WHEN IT ENFORCED AND INTERPRETS THAT AGREEMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S EARLIER MOTION. SECTION 664.6 AS OPPOSED TO OTHER PROCEDURE THAT MAY BE AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLOW THE COURT TO RESCIND AN AGREEMENT OR DETERMINE A REMEDY FOR ITS BREACH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
